themes.reasoning_notes: ETB and attack both place a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control, making it a clear boardwide counters payoff.
Its ETB/attack trigger gains life equal to your other creatures, rewarding creature-heavy boards with repeatable lifegain.
Both modes scale with the number of other creatures, so it strongly rewards going wide even without creating tokens itself.
Its ETB/attack trigger repeatedly puts a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control, making it a strong boardwide counters enabler.
Both the counter spread and life gain scale with having many other creatures, so it clearly rewards wide creature boards.
It gains life on ETB and attack based on your board size, but the life gain is supportive rather than a dedicated lifegain payoff.
